modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a field technician and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in symptom-first manner and use a short and minimal tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be no spelling errors and some repeated wording or phrases.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Pop-up blocker in Chrome prevents access to Datatel and Banner.

full_description_text: The user is unable to open Datatel due to a pop-up blocker in Google Chrome. This issue is causing interruptions while trying to work and prevents downloading reports from Banner. The random pop-ups are affecting productivity.
short_description: Pop-up blocker in Chrome prevents access to Datatel and Banner.
description: The user is unable to open Datatel due to a pop-up blocker in Google Chrome. This issue is causing interruptions while trying to work and prevents downloading reports from Banner. The random pop-ups are affecting productivity.
